description:
Create a UML sequence diagram documenting the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow with PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) based on the protocol specification in ~/Desktop/oauth2_pkce_spec.txt. 

The diagram must include two pages:
1. Page 1 (titled 'Authorization Code Flow with PKCE'): Model a sequence with four participants (User, Client, Authorization Server, and Resource Server). The flow must include the initial authorization request with 'code_challenge', user login/consent steps, authorization code exchange (including 'code_verifier'), access token usage to fetch data, at least one self-message (e.g., internal verification), and a security note regarding PKCE.
2. Page 2 (titled 'Token Refresh Flow'): Model the refresh token exchange.

Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/oauth2_sequence.drawio and export Page 1 as a PNG image to ~/Desktop/oauth2_sequence.png.

Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
